arts.ttl: Arsenal aren't the new Stoke… they've just turned clever corners into a brutal ballet, writes OLIVER HOLT
arts.sum: OLIVER HOLT: At the core of it, for all the fascination of the ballet in the six-yard box, is the metronomic excellence of the delivery by the corner takers.

arts.ttl: Preview: Sunderland vs. Stoke City - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Sunderland and Stoke City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: What the world is saying about Arsenal as Stoke City try to regain mantle
arts.sum: There were moments in Arsenal's set-piece-powered win over Manchester United that were spookily familiar to anyone who watched Stoke City under Tony Pulis as they fought to establish themselves in the Premier League. Arsenal have not suddenly turned into Stoke City under Tony Pulis - at the least, Arteta does not want any comparisons."
